evidence_snippet: Lord Chambers, alongside with Lord Bigglestone and Lord Perryn, joined Ser Pate of Longleaf and his ragged band of survivors from earlier battles and fought together in the Battle by the Lakeshore.
During the Dance of the Dragons, Lord Chambers sided with the Blacks and Rhaenyra Targaryen.
